description: Send new message. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/mailbox/send. Required parameters: to, subject, body_html, company_id. Optional parameters include cc, attachments, email_provider_id, offer_id, visibility, bcc, candidate_offer_mapping, reply_to_message_id.

params.name: cc
params.description: List of CC-recipients - see below to item spec

params.name: to
params.description: List of TO-recipients - see below to item spec

params.name: offer_id
params.description: Optional offer id from current context

params.name: bcc
params.description: List of BCC-recipients - see below to item spec

params.name: candidate_offer_mapping
params.description: Optional map with candidate_ids to offer_id relation. For bulk send.

params.name: reply_to_message_id
params.description: Optional message id, use when replying

example_request:
POST /c/{company_id}/mailbox/send

Required params: to, subject, body_html, company_id

Optional params: cc, attachments, email_provider_id, offer_id, visibility, bcc, candidate_offer_mapping, reply_to_message_id
